text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Arrrgh! I won't let this get me down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One lunch break, I spot Kawakami Princess
shouting at the top of her voice by herself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Races are my priority right now! I can't let this
distract me! Besides, this glorious sheen would
never grow dull so easily!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: My beautiful princess tail still glows!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll just groom it thoroughly on my next day off!
Until then, I can tough it out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems concerned about not having enough
time for proper tail care because of her races.
Maybe I should adjust her schedule moving
forward.
